raw_consumer_statement:
Transaction Date : XX/XX/year> Merchant : XXXX XXXX XXXX ( XXXX IL ) Disputed Amount : {$1100.00} Dispute Submitted to Citibank : XX/XX/year> Provisional Credit Issued : XX/XX/year> Certified Letter Follow-up Sent to Citi Bank XXXX XX/XX/year> ( Return receipt confirmed ) Current Status : No final resolution, no instructions for returning the package, and no meaningful communication from Citibank Details XXXX I did not authorize this transaction. The item was ordered fraudulently using my Citibank XXXX Visa card. Upon receipt of the package, I immediately reported the transaction to Citibank. The package remains unopened and in its original condition at my residence. 
I also contacted the merchant by email to notify them that the transaction was fraudulent and that I would coordinate with Citibank regarding the return, but the issue remains unresolved. 
Despite repeated attempts to contact Citibank, including phone calls and a certified letter sent on XX/XX/year>, I have received no final resolution, no instructions for returning the item, and no written confirmation that I will not be held liable for this unauthorized charge. 
This ongoing lack of communication and resolution has caused significant stress and inconvenience. 
I will attach the shipping invoice on the outside of the box, the certified mail I sent to Citibank, and the return receipt confirming that Citibank received my letter.
